meta.title: Hernan von Hausen — CV
meta.description: Hernan von Hausen Cardenas — Product Business Analyst. Resume / CV.

summary: I have over four years of experience driving data-driven decisions in the retail, mobility, and food service industries. I currently work in product management, leading the definition of product requirements, backlog prioritization, and stakeholder alignment for a real-time inventory engine at one of Latin America's largest retailers. I have a strong foundation in Agile, SQL, and product analytics.

bullets: Define product requirements, user stories, backlog prioritization, and sprint planning for GIV and Inventory within the Order Management cluster.
Act as a bridge between stakeholders, translating complex requirements into technical initiatives across the entire product lifecycle.
Leverage Python, SQL, and AI tools to optimize tasks and analyze and extract data, identifying optimization areas that inform roadmap prioritization decisions.
Built executive dashboards in Tableau for C-suite decision-making across 8 LATAM markets on weekly, monthly, and quarterly cycles.
Designed automated data pipelines reducing manual data gathering and improving report delivery speed.
Acted as a bridge between stakeholders, translating complex data insights into actionable recommendations for senior leadership.
Created tailored reporting for the LATAM Regional Manager aligned to specific business requirements across weekly, monthly, and quarterly cycles.
Conducted complex business analysis identifying operational bottlenecks and process improvement opportunities.
Managed end-to-end IT systems (POS, Shopify, UberEats, Rappi, Braze CRM) for a multi-brand hospitality holding.
Developed automated analytics flows using Power BI, SQL, and Python, supporting tactical and strategic decision-making.
Led IT implementation for new cafeteria brand (EspressHood) as primary counterpart to vendor ParTech, managing timelines and system deployment.
Built automated Fixed Income reports for the Colombian and Mexican markets: rate curve construction, implied monetary policy rate extraction, and fair valuation of government bonds.
Operated in a high-throughput environment serving 700+ daily customers, developing rapid prioritization, workflow optimization, and real-time coordination skills under constant pressure.

education.degree: Industrial Civil Engineering, Diploma in Transportation Engineering
